---
title: "Blog"
description: "Blog posts and tutorials by Your Name"    # CHANGE
listing:
  contents: listing-default  # CHANGE: rename to match your folder name (e.g. blog)
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-height: auto
page-layout: full
---
